title: Home Screen - Both earbuds are disconnected
scenario: Home Screen displays greyed out earbud fields with disconnected status when both earbuds are in the case
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure both earbuds are disconnected (not in case, not connected via Bluetooth).
Place both earbuds into the charging case.
Observe the Home screen UI elements.
Now remove both earbuds from the case and ensure they connect to the app.
Observe the Home screen UI elements again.
expected: When both earbuds are placed in the case: Left, Right, and Case fields are greyed out showing only the % symbol (not exact percentage), the Status field shows "disconnected" with a red indicator, and the earbud images are greyed out. When earbuds are connected and out of the case: Left, Right, and Case fields show battery levels with green indicators and the Status field shows "connected".
